Let me look at the gray square more carefully. It's at rows 52-53, cols 40-54. The pattern is:

- Row 53: BBBBBBWBBBBBBB
The white cells are at row 52, cols 46-53 and row 53, col 46. This might indicate:

Hmm, this is getting confusing. Let me try a different approach.

- Row 39: all buttons light gray (OFF)
